title: Decision 2 — drop OPA for v0; bring back only for high-stakes flows
summary: Defers OPA/Rego policy engine for v0, leaning on nanoclaw's existing user_roles, OneCLI secret modes, pending_approvals, and unknown_sender_policy primitives until specific reintroduction triggers fire.
notes: Numbered decision record under /docs/plan/decisions/ with clear Decision/Rationale/Triggers structure — strong ADR signal. No explicit `Status: Accepted` frontmatter, so `locked` left false per spec; the doc is declarative and treated as in-effect for v0, but consumer should confirm lock state from the plan README if precedence matters.
